allow: Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "import ast; ast.parse\(open\('ui/app.py'\).read\(\)\); print\('app.py OK'\)" && .venv/bin/python -c "import ast; ast.parse\(open\('agent/agent.py'\).read\(\)\); print\('agent.py OK'\)")

Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "
import ast
for f in ['ui/app.py', 'ui/utils/styles.py', 'ui/components/tables.py']:
    ast.parse\(open\(f\).read\(\)\)
    print\(f'✓ {f}'\)
")
